pattern_errors.heightened_action: Pattern threshold not yet reached (requires 3+ occurrences). However, a PRECAUTIONARY flag is raised: scaling errors are high-impact because they are systematic and silent — one misread contaminates an entire sheet. Even at 1 occurrence, LEARNED_001 through LEARNED_004 are activated immediately. If scaling errors appear in 2 further sessions, a MANDATORY PRE-EXTRACTION SCALE AUDIT protocol will be enforced on all new projects, requiring human confirmation of scale before any measurements are accepted.
